# BMC vs PoDManager 共有接口参数差异分析输入

请基于下面的共有接口配对表和两侧参数 YAML，分析每一对共有接口的参数差异。
只比较参数 `name` 和 `type`。按 `path/header/body/query/response` 分类输出差异。
建议输出一个 Excel 工作簿：`common_interface_param_diff_llm_summary.xlsx`。

建议列：

`bmc_section, bmc_title, podm_section, podm_title, category, param_name, bmc_type, podm_type, difference_type, notes`

## 共有接口配对表

```csv
category,confidence,title_similarity_score,method_same,bmc_index,bmc_section,bmc_title,bmc_method,bmc_uri,podm_index,podm_section,podm_title,podm_method,podm_uri
```

```yaml
source: D:\1-projects\PoDM\data\20260511\华为服务器 iBMC300 Redfish 接口说明.docx
profile: bmc
interface_count: 340
interfaces:
- index: 1

- index: 76
  section: 3.2.88
  title: 创建SP服务的诊断配置
  method: POST
  uri: https://device_ip/redfish/v1/Managers/manager_id/SPService/SPDiagnose
  params:
    path:
    - name: manager_id
      type: 管理资源ID
    header:
    - name: X-Auth-Token
      type: ''
    body:
    - name: auth_value
      type: 请求消息的鉴权参数
    - name: header_type
      type: 请求消息的格式
    - name: typevalue
      type: 字符串(必填选项)
    - name: modevalue
      type: 字符串(必填选项)
    - name: timevalue
      type: 数字
    - name: itemnamevalue
      type: 字符串(选填选项)
    - name: itemminutesvalue
      type: 数字（选填选项）
    - name: itemtimesvalue
      type: 数字（选填）
    - name: itemmodevalue
      type: 字符串(选填选项)
    - name: logdumpvalue
      type: 对象（选填）格式为{
    - name: rebootdelayminutesvalue
      type: 整型（选填）
    - name: assetverificationvalue
      type: '对象（选填）格式为{"CountVerification": [{"CountItem": countitemvalue,"CountValue": countvalue}]}'
    - name: CPU
      type: 执行CPU压力测试，适合短时间测试场景。
    - name: Memory
      type: 执行算法简单的内存压力测试，执行时间快，包括ECC，单bit和多bit的检查。
    - name: Disk
      type: 利用硬盘SMART的短自检程序，诊断时间短，适用于快速确认磁盘是否故障的场景。
    - name: NIC
      type: 网卡自检测试。
    - name: RAID
      type: RAID链路误码诊断。仅支持SP686C和SP186 RAID卡诊断且需要RAID卡下存在空闲盘。
    - name: NPU
      type: 部分测试项的测试时间相比全量模式有缩短，适合短时间测试场景。覆盖项目为：SignalQuality，PrbsTest，HbmStress：stress模式，20分钟，EDP：5分钟；TDP：15分钟；NicTest，Bandwidth，Aicore：standard模式，1轮
    - name: Power
      type: 电源TDP（Thermal Design Power）功耗压力测试
    - name: SignalQuality
      type: 执行NPU眼图诊断
    - name: PCIeSignalQuality
      type: 执行NPU眼图 PCIe项诊断
    - name: HCCSSignalQuality
      type: 执行NPU眼图HCCS项诊断
    - name: RoCESignalQuality
      type: 执行NPU眼图RoCE项诊断
    - name: Bandwidth
      type: 执行NPU带宽诊断
    - name: PrbsTest
      type: 执行NPU PRBS码流诊断，对NPU芯片的RoCE网口收发PRBS码流，诊断硬件链路的通信信号质量。
    - name: HbmStress
      type: 执行NPU片上内存诊断
    - name: EDP
      type: 执行NPU EDP功耗压力测试
    - name: TDP
      type: 执行NPU TDP功耗压力测试
    - name: NicTest
      type: 执行NPU NIC诊断，对NPU网口连通性和NPU网口带宽进行诊断。
    - name: Aicore
      type: 执行NPU AICore诊断，对AICore ERROR进行诊断
    - name: StressTest
      type: 执行CPU压力测试，适合短时间测试场景。
    - name: MemTest
      type: 执行算法简单的内存压力测试，执行时间快，包括ECC，单bit和多bit的检查。
    - name: SmartSelfTest
      type: 利用硬盘SMART的短自检程序，诊断时间短，适用于快速确认磁盘是否故障的场景。
    - name: EthtoolTest
      type: 网卡自检测试
    - name: PhyErrorTest
      type: RAID链路误码诊断
    - name: DgemmTest
      type: 针对特定CPU进行Dgemm压测
    - name: Diagnose
      type: ''
    - name: DeviceType
      type: ''
    - name: Mode
      type: ''
    - name: DurationMinutes
      type: ''
    - name: SubItems
      type: ''
    - name: ItemName
      type: ''
    - name: ItemDurationMinutes
      type: ''
    - name: ItemExecuteTimes
      type: ''
    - name: ItemMode
      type: ''
    - name: AssetVerification
      type: ''
    - name: ActionOnCompleted
      type: ''
    - name: LogDump
      type: ''
    - name: RebootDelayMinutes
      type: ''
    query: []
    response:
    - name: '@odata.context'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.id'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.type'
      type: 字符串
    - name: Diagnose
      type: 数组
    - name: DeviceType
      type: 字符串
    - name: Mode
      type: 字符串
    - name: DurationMinutes
      type: 数字
    - name: SubItems
      type: 列表
    - name: AssetVerification
      type: 对象
    - name: CountVerification
      type: 对象数组
    - name: CountItem
      type: 字符串
    - name: CountValue
      type: 数字
```

```yaml
- index: 16
  section: 4.2.4
  title: 导入刀片服务器BIOS、BMC和RAID控制器配置
  method: POST
  uri: /redfish/v1/Managers/{manager_id}/Actions/Oem/HuaweiPublic/Manager.ImportConfiguration
  params:
    path:
    - name: manager_id
      type: string
    header:
    - name: X-Auth-Token
      type: string
    - name: Content-Type
      type: string
    body:
    - name: Type
      type: 必填URI
    - name: Content
      type: 本地：“/tmp/文件路径”远程：支持的文件传输协议：sftp、https、nfs、cifs、scp
    query: []
    response:
    - name: '@odata.context'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.type'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.id'
      type: 字符串
    - name: Id
      type: 字符串
    - name: Name
      type: 字符串
    - name: TaskState
      type: 字符串
    - name: StartTime
      type: 字符串
    - name: Messages
      type: 数组
    - name: Oem/HuaweiPublic
      type: 自定义属性
    - name: TaskPercentage
      type: 字符串
    - name: TakeStatus
      type: 字符串

- index: 18
  section: 4.2.13
  title: 恢复整框出厂设置
  method: POST
  uri: /redfish/v1/Managers/{manager_id}/Actions/Oem/HuaweiPublic/Manager.RestoreFactory
  params:
    path:
    - name: manager_id
      type: string
    header:
    - name: X-Auth-Token
      type: string
    - name: Content-Type
      type: string
    body:
    - name: ResetType
      type: 支持的类型包括：ResetAll：将所有配置还原PreserveNetwork：保留网络配置PreserveNetworkAndUsers：保留网络配置和用户配置（用户名、密码信息）
    query: []
    response:
    - name: code
      type: 字符串
    - name: message
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.type'
      type: 字符串
    - name: MessageId
      type: 字符串
    - name: RelatedProperties
      type: 数组
    - name: Message
      type: 字符串
    - name: MessageArgs
      type: 数组
    - name: Severity
      type: 字符串
    - name: Resolution
      type: 字符串
- index: 19

      type: string
    header:

      type: string
    - name: Content-Type
      type: string
    body:
    - name: TransferProtocol
      type: 支持的协议包括：HTTPS
    - name: Path
      type: 指"/tmp"及其子目录
    query: []
    response: []

- index: 47
  section: 4.2.48
  title: 更新SP相关的schema文件
  method: POST
  uri: /redfish/v1/Managers/{manager_id}/SPService/Actions/SPService.UpdateSchemaFiles
  params:
    path:
    - name: manager_id
      type: string
    header:
    - name: X-Auth-Token
      type: string
    - name: Content-Type
      type: string
    body:
    - name: ChecksumValue
      type: 需满足如下正则：^[0-9a-fA-F]{64}$校验和获取算法SHA256
    - name: FileName
      type: 需满足如下正则：^(.){5,255}$schema文件放置路径“/tmp/web/文件名”
    query: []
    response:
    - name: '@odata.context'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.type'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.id'
      type: 字符串
    - name: Id
      type: 字符串
    - name: Name
      type: 字符串
    - name: TaskState
      type: 字符串
    - name: StartTime
      type: 字符串
    - name: Messages
      type: 数组
    - name: Oem/HuaweiPublic
      type: 自定义属性
    - name: TaskPercentage
      type: 字符串
- index: 48
  section: 4.2.49

  uri: /redfish/v1/Managers/{manager_id}/SPService/Actions/SPService.Dump

    - name: Content-Type
      type: string
    body:

      type: URI
    - name: Content
      type: 操作路径本地导出："/tmp/文件名"远程导出："sftp://用户名:用户密码@{IP}/目录/文件名"文件传输协议包括五种：sftp、https、nfs、cifs、scp
    query: []
    response:
    - name: '@odata.context'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.type'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.id'
      type: 字符串
    - name: Id
      type: 字符串
    - name: Name
      type: 字符串

      type: 字符串
    - name: StartTime
      type: 字符串
    - name: Messages
      type: 数组
    - name: TaskPercentage
      type: 字符串
- index: 49
  section: 4.2.50

  method: GET
  uri: /redfish/v1/Managers/{manager_id}/SPService/SPOSInstallPara
  params:
    path:
    - name: manager_id
      type: string
    header:
    - name: X-Auth-Token
      type: string
    - name: Content-Type
      type: string
    body: []
    query: []
    response:
    - name: '@odata.context'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.id'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.type'
      type: 字符串
    - name: Name
      type: 字符串
    - name: Members@odata.count
      type: 数字
    - name: Members
      type: OS安装配置资源列表
    - name: '@odata.id'
      type: 字符串
- index: 50
  section: 4.2.51
  title: 创建SP服务的OS安装配置
  method: POST
  uri: /redfish/v1/Managers/{manager_id}/SPService/SPOSInstallPara
  params:
    path:
    - name: manager_id
      type: string
    header:
    - name: X-Auth-Token
      type: string
    - name: Content-Type
      type: string
    body:
    - name: InstallMode
      type: 安装模式，可取值：RecommendedCustomizedTemplate
    - name: TemplateName
      type: 模板名：SLES15_minimalSLES12_minimalUbuntu20.04_minimalUbuntu22.04_minimalCentOS8_minimalCentOS7_minimalEulerOS_minimal_with_grub_passwordEulerOS_minimal_without_grub_passwordopenEuler_minimalBC-Linux7_minimalBC-Linux-for-Euler_minimalNeoKylin7_minimalKylin10_minimalDebian10_minimalLinx6_minimalUOS20e_minimalCTyunOS2_minimalKylinSec3_minimalCULinux_minimalSLES15_GUISLES12_GUICentOS8_GUICentOS7_GUIopenEuler_GUIBC-Linux7_GUIBC-Linux-for-Euler_GUIBC-Linux-for-Euler_GUI_DDENeoKylin7_GUIKylin10_GUIDebian10_GUILinx6_GUIUOS20e_GUIKylinSec3_GUI
    - name: OSType
      type: 安装OS类型
    - name: BootType
      type: BIOS启动模式，可取值：UEFIBoot
    - name: CDKey
      type: Linux：为空
    - name: RootPwd
      type: 'SUSE /CentOS/EulerOS/CTYunOS/CULinux/Debian/Kylin/Linx/NeoKylin/openEuler/UOS/KylinSec/BC-Linux: 最少6位Ubuntu：最少8位"RootPwd":"Rootpwd;grub: Grub2Pwd"如果有grub密码，则RootPwd字段由RootPwd以及grub密码拼接，中间以“;grub:”相隔，Rootpwd和grub密码中不能包含字符串";grub:"'
    - name: Grub2PwdExist
      type: 是否有grub密码，可取值：truefalse
    - name: HostName
      type: 取值为[a-z，A-Z，0-9]必须配置网络才可生效，总长度不超过63字符；
    - name: Language
      type: 字符串
    - name: TimeZone
      type: 字符串
    - name: Keyboard
      type: 字符串
    - name: AutoPosition
      type: 是否支持自动选择安装盘，可取值：truefalseSmart Provisioning自动选盘顺序：软RAID直通盘RAID扣卡RAID标卡NVMe盘
    - name: Position
      type: 对象
    - name: Autopart
      type: 是否支持自动分区，可取值：truefalse
    - name: MediaType
      type: 支持系统部署的介质类型可取值：Disk:选择在Disk设备上部署操作系统（默认）LVM:选择在逻辑卷上部署操作系统（仅支持CentOS7U6、CentOS7.x、 CentOS8.x、openEuler22.03LTS、KylinV10SP2、SLES12.x、SLES15.x）
    - name: LVMSettings
      type: LVM参数配置信息，MediaType为LVM时该字段生效。
    - name: VGName
      type: 字符串
    - name: Partition
      type: 对象
    - name: CheckFirmware
      type: 是否校验固件，可取值：truefalse
    - name: CheckCompatibility
      type: 是否校验兼容性，校验不通过则停止部署，可取值：truefalse可通过zh-cn_topic_0000002506716845.xml 查询SP服务的配置信息资源，接口查询OS是否支持该特性
    - name: CheckMedia
      type: 是否校验光盘匹配所选择部署的操作系统，可取值：truefalse
    - name: Software
      type: 对象数组
    - name: device
      type: 字符串
    - name: DeviceType
      type: 对象
    - name: BondSettings
      type: 对象
    - name: VLANSettings
      type: 对象
    - name: BridgeSettings
      type: 对象
    - name: IPv4Addresses
      type: 对象数组
    - name: IPv6Addresses
      type: 对象数组
    - name: NameServers
      type: DNS服务器的IP地址，取值可以为IPv4或IPv6的网络地址Ubuntu系统仅支持配置单个IPv4的DNS
    - name: EnvironmentName
      type: 字符串
    - name: PackagaeName
      type: 字符串数组
    - name: PatternName
      type: 字符串数组
    - name: CustomizedEnabled
      type: 可取值：truefalse
    - name: RemovePackageName
      type: 字符串数组
    - name: RemovePatternName
      type: 字符串数组
    - name: FirstBootScript
      type: 可取值：truefalse可通过 zh-cn_topic_0000002506716845.xml接口查询OS是否支持该特性
    - name: UploadFiles
      type: 对象
    - name: BootSettings
      type: grub参数配置信息
    - name: BootEffective
      type: 字符串
    - name: BootParameters
      type: 字符串数组
    - name: CentOS/EulerOS/Ubuntu/Debian/NeoKylin/BC-Linux/Kylin/CTyunOS/KylinSec/TencentOS
      type: America/New_York
    - name: Linx/UOS
      type: America/New_York
    - name: openEuler
      type: America/New_York
    - name: SLES
      type: America/New_York
    query: []
    response:
    - name: '@odata.context'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.id'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.type'
      type: 字符串
    - name: Id
      type: 字符串
    - name: Name
      type: 字符串
    - name: InstallMode
      type: 字符串
    - name: OSType
      type: 字符串
    - name: BootType
      type: 字符串
    - name: CDKey
      type: 字符串
    - name: RootPwd
      type: 字符串
    - name: HostName
      type: 字符串
    - name: Language
      type: 字符串
    - name: TimeZone
      type: 字符串
    - name: Keyboard
      type: 字符串
    - name: CheckFirmware
      type: 布尔型
    - name: CheckCompatibility
      type: 布尔型
    - name: CheckMedia
      type: 布尔型
    - name: AutoPosition
      type: 布尔型
    - name: Position
      type: 对象
    - name: Autopart
      type: 布尔型
    - name: Partition
      type: 对象
    - name: Name
      type: 字符串
    - name: FileSystem
      type: 字符串
    - name: Size
      type: 字符串
    - name: Software
      type: 对象
    - name: FileName
      type: 字符串
    - name: NetCfg
      type: 对象
    - name: Device
      type: 对象
    - name: Name
      type: 字符串
    - name: MAC
      type: 字符串
    - name: Silkprint
      type: 对象
    - name: Location
      type: 字符串
    - name: DeviceName
      type: 字符串
    - name: Port
      type: 字符串
    - name: IPv4Addresses
      type: 对象
    - name: Address
      type: 字符串
    - name: SubnetMask
      type: 字符串
    - name: AddressOrigin
      type: 字符串
    - name: IPv6Addresses
      type: 对象
    - name: Address
      type: 字符串
    - name: PrefixLength
      type: 数字
    - name: AddressOrigin
      type: 字符串
    - name: Gateway
      type: 字符串
    - name: NameServers
      type: 指定网口地址为动态模式时，所需的DNS服务器信息。
    - name: Packages

  method: POST
  uri: /redfish/v1/Managers/{manager_id}/DiagnosticService/Actions/DiagnosticService.ExportVideo

      type: OsresetVideo：重启录像CaterrorVideo：CPU出错录像PoweroffVideo：关机录像

      type: 字符串

- index: 109
  section: 4.2.115
  title: 设置BMC吊销版本列表
  method: POST
  uri: /redfish/v1/Managers/{manager_id}/Actions/Oem/HuaweiPublic/Manager.ImportRevokedVersion
  params:
    path:
    - name: manager_id
      type: string
    header:
    - name: X-Auth-Token
      type: string
    - name: Content-Type
      type: string
    body:
    - name: Operation
      type: URI
    - name: RevokedVersions
      type: 添加版本号时，当执行添加后，吊销列表中版本号数量超过最大规格，则执行添加操作失败；删除版本号时，当参数RevokedVersions中有吊销版本列表中不存在的版本号时，能够执行成功，吊销版本列表中存在的版本号正常删除
    query: []
    response:
    - name: code
      type: 字符串
    - name: message
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.type'
      type: 字符串
    - name: MessageId
      type: 字符串
    - name: RelatedProperties
      type: 数组
    - name: Message
      type: 字符串
    - name: MessageArgs
      type: 数组
    - name: Severity
      type: 字符串
    - name: Resolution
      type: 字符串

    - name: ConnectTypesSupported
      type: 数组

      type: 数字
    - name: Port
      type: 数字

      type: 布尔

      type: 数字

      type: 字符串

- index: 116
  section: 4.3.3
  title: 修改指定系统资源属性
  method: PATCH
  uri: /redfish/v1/Systems/{system_id}
  params:
    path:
    - name: system_id
      type: 逻辑计算节点ID，取值为1~8
    header:
    - name: X-Auth-Token
      type: string
    - name: Content-Type
      type: string
    - name: If-Match
      type: string
    body:
    - name: UUID
      type: 格式满足正则表达式：^[0-9A-F]{8}-[0-9A-F]{4}-[0-9A-F]{4}-[0-9A-F]{4}-[0-9A-F]{12}$00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 代表恢复UUID为默认值刀片AC掉电后自动恢复为默认值
    - name: ConfigurationModel
      type: 字符串
    - name: HostName
      type: 字符串
    - name: AssetTag
      type: 'null'
    - name: PowerRestorePolicy
      type: 通电开机策略，包括AlwayOn：保持上电LastState：与之前保持一致AlwaysOff：保持下电
    - name: number
      type: 数字0-100
    - name: SafePowerOffTimeoutEnabled
      type: 下电时限使能开关
    - name: WakeOnLANStatus
      type: 网络唤醒使能
    - name: SafePowerOffTimeoutEnabled
      type: 下电时限使能开关
    - name: SafePowerOffTimoutSeconds
      type: 数字
    - name: PowerOnStrategy
      type: TurnOn：保持上电RestorePreviousState：与之前保持一致StayOff：保持下电
    - name: PowerOnStrategyExceptions
      type: 通电开机策略的例外场景
    - name: PowerRestoreDelaySeconds
      type: DefaultDelay：默认延迟模式HalfDelay：二分延迟模式FixedDelay：固定延迟模式RandomDelay：随机延迟模式
    - name: PowerRestoreDelaySeconds
      type: 数字
    - name: ProductAlias
      type: 产品别名
    - name: LocalKvmEnabled
      type: truefalse
    - name: AutoCloseLocalDisplay
      type: truefalse
    - name: IP
      type: IP地址
    - name: BootModeConfigOverIpmiEnabled
      type: trueflase
    - name: CPUPState
      type: 数字
    - name: CPUTState
      type: 数字
    - name: HostnameSyncEnabled
      type: truefalse
    - name: EnergySavingEnabled
      type: truefalse
    - name: DEMTEnabled
      type: truefalse
    - name: power_control
      type: ManualPowerOff：漏液后需要手动下电AutoPowerOff：漏液后自动下电
    - name: Type
      type: 1~14个字节的字符串
    - name: Value
      type: 0-65535
    query: []
    response:
    - name: '@odata.context'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.id'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.type'
      type: 字符串
    - name: Id
      type: 字符串
    - name: Name
      type: 字符串
    - name: AssetTag
      type: 字符串
    - name: Manufacturer
      type: 字符串
    - name: Model
      type: 字符串
    - name: SerialNumber
      type: 字符串
    - name: UUID
      type: 字符串
    - name: HostName
      type: 字符串
    - name: PartNumber
      type: 字符串
    - name: HostingRole
      type: 对象
    - name: HostWatchdogTimer
      type: 指定系统资源的看门狗计时器功能
    - name: FunctionEnabled
      type: 布尔
    - name: TimeoutAction
      type: 字符串
    - name: Status
      type: 对象
    - name: PowerState
      type: 字符串
    - name: PowerRestorePolicy
      type: 字符串
    - name: Boot
      type: 指定系统资源的启动参数
    - name: BootSourceOverrideTarget
      type: 字符串
    - name: BootSourceOverrideEnabled
      type: 字符串
    - name: BootSourceOverrideMode
      type: 字符串
    - name: BootSourceOverrideTarget@Redfish.AllowableValues
      type: 数组
    - name: TrustedModules
      type: 指定系统资源的可信模块
    - name: FirmwareVersion
      type: 字符串
    - name: InterfaceType
      type: 字符串
    - name: Status
      type: 对象
    - name: Oem/HuaweiPublic
      type: 自定义属性
    - name: ProtocolType

- index: 117
  section: 4.3.4
  title: 重启服务器
  method: POST
  uri: /redfish/v1/Systems/{system_id}/Actions/ComputerSystem.Reset
  params:
    path:
    - name: system_id
      type: 字符串
    header:
    - name: X-Auth-Token
      type: string
    - name: Content-Type
      type: string
    body:
    - name: ResetType
      type: On：上电GracefulShutdown：正常下电ForceRestart：强制重启Nmi：触发不可屏蔽中断ForcePowerCycle：强制下电再上电PowerCycle：安全下电再上电
    query: []
    response:
    - name: code
      type: 字符串
    - name: message
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@Message.ExtendedInfo'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.type'
      type: 字符串
    - name: MessageId
      type: 字符串
    - name: RelatedProperties
      type: 数组
    - name: Message
      type: 字符串
    - name: MessageArgs
      type: 数组
    - name: Severity
      type: 字符串
    - name: Resolution
      type: 字符串
- index: 118
  section: 4.3.5
  title: FRU上下电控制
  method: POST
  uri: /redfish/v1/Systems/{system_id}/Actions/Oem/HuaweiPublic/ComputerSystem.FruControl
  params:
    path:
    - name: system_id
      type: 字符串
    header:
    - name: X-Auth-Token
      type: string
    - name: Content-Type
      type: string
    body:
    - name: FruControlType
      type: On：上电GracefulShutdown：正常下电ForceRestart：强制重启Nmi：触发不可屏蔽中断ForcePowerCycle：强制下电再上电PowerCycle：安全下电再上电
    - name: FruID
      type: 0：OS平面4：全域平面全域平面仅Atlas 950 A5 SuperPoD机型支持，且计算域处于上电状态，只支持：全域下电：计算域和交换域正常下电全域重启：计算域和交换域强制重启全域下电再上电：计算域和交换域安全下电再上电全域上电：计算域和交换域上电，此种场景fruId填0 ，FruControlType填On
    query: []
    response:
    - name: code
      type: 字符串
    - name: message
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@Message.ExtendedInfo'
      type: 字符串
    - name: '@odata.type'
      type: 字符串
    - name: MessageId
      type: 字符串
    - name: RelatedProperties
      type: 数组
    - name: Message
      type: 字符串
    - name: MessageArgs
      type: 数组
    - name: Severity
      type: 字符串
    - name: Resolution
      type: 字符串

- index: 198
  section: 4.4.21
  title: 修改网络适配器单个资源信息
  method: PATCH
  uri: /redfish/v1/Chassis/{chassis_id}/NetworkAdapters/{networkadapters_id}
  params:
    path:
    - name: chassis_id
      type: string
    - name: networkadapters_id
      type: string

    - name: X-Auth-Token
      type: string
    - name: Content-Type
      type: '-'

    - name: HotPlugAttention

    - name: PreloadPortCount
      type: 可通过/redfish/v1/Chassis/chassis_id/NetworkAdapters/netorkadapters_id发起GET操作获取属性PreloadPortCountAllowableValues获取指定网络适配器可支持的预加载端口数量枚举

  section: 4.4.29

- index: 214
  section: 4.4.37
  title: 修改指定PCIe设备资源信息
  method: PATCH
  uri: /redfish/v1/Chassis/{chassis_id}/PCIeDevices/{pciedevices_id}
  params:
    path:
    - name: chassis_id
      type: string
    - name: pciedevices_id
      type: string
    header:

      type: string
    body:
    - name: MRCLogLevel
      type: '-'
    - name: UEFILogLevel
      type: ''
    - name: PxeOption
      type: 可选值：UefiIpv4UefiIpv6UefiIpv4AndIpv6
    - name: BootOption
      type: 可选值：HDD BootBase Board PXE BootNone该字段需要和BootEffective字段同时传入。
    - name: BootEffective
      type: 可选值：One-timePermanent该字段需要和BootOption字段同时传入。
    - name: SecureBoot
      type: 可选值：EnableDisable

      type: 指定的具体泵组
```
